title: Experience of culture, arts and heritage by adults in Northern Ireland 2024/25
body: "This bulletin contains information on participation in arts activities and attendance at arts events, use of the public library service, visited a museum or science centre, visited PRONI and visited a place of historic interest. The bulletin is an Official Statistics publication produced annually by the Analytics Division of the Department for Communities. This bulletin provides findings from the 2024/25 Continuous Household Survey. "
